title: Artificial Intelligence Implementation Steps Part 2B Cheat Sheet
printNote: Quick reference for Artificial Intelligence Implementation Steps Part 2B in Artificial Intelligence.

entries.syntax: # Python implementation for Artificial Intelligence Implementation Steps Part 2B
entries.example:
# Python implementation for Artificial Intelligence Implementation Steps Part 2B
def process_data(records):
    """Process input dataset cleanly."""
    results = [item.strip().upper() for item in records if item]
    return results

if __name__ == '__main__':
    data = ['apple', 'banana', 'cherry']
    print('Processed:', process_data(data))
entries.description: Basic syntax for Artificial Intelligence Implementation Steps Part 2B
